de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Class SupportedTaclets

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions.SupportedTaclets

  • public final class SupportedTaclets
extends java.lang.Object
    Change this file if you want to change the set of taclets that can be used for external provers. REMARK: Adding taclets at this point does not automatically mean that the added taclets are used for external provers. It also depends on: 1. the taclet fulfills the condition that are checked while translating.

        Returns:
        returns the number of taclets that are supported.

      • contains

        public boolean contains(java.lang.String tacletname,
                        boolean mustBeSelected)
        Checks whether a taclet specified by its name can be used for external provers.
        Parameters:
        tacletname - the name of the taclet
        Returns:
        true if the taclet can be used for external provers.

      • selectCategory

        public void selectCategory(SupportedTaclets.Category cat)

      • validateSelectionModes

        public void validateSelectionModes()

      • getTreeModel

        public javax.swing.tree.TreeModel getTreeModel()
        This is the real interesting method of this class. Change this method to change the range of supported taclets.
        Returns:
        returns the tree model that contains all supported taclets.

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • getMissingTaclets

        public java.util.Collection<java.lang.String> getMissingTaclets(java.util.Collection<Taclet> taclets)
        Returns:
        All taclet names of taclets that should be used but that are not available. Use this method only for testing. It uses only simple data structure, so that the necessary time is in O(n^2)
